option.name: filePath
option.value: /Musique (snapshot).java

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <top> <VBox spacing="8.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Détail de l'évènement" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Structure de la page détail évènement amateur." wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </top> <center> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="0.0" /> </padding> <StackPane minHeight="240.0" styleClass="empty-state-card"> <Label text="Couverture de l'évènement" /> </StackPane> <HBox spacing="12.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Acheter ticket" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Retour aux évènements" /> </HBox> <Label text="Description de l'évènement" wrapText="true" /> <GridPane hgap="16.0" vgap="12.0"> <Label text="Horaires" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label text="Prix d'entrée" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label text="Capacité" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label text="Galerie" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventDetailController" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="event-detail-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="event-detail-root"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="2.0" /> </padding>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card event-detail-main-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane minHeight="240.0" styleClass="event-cover-box"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitHeight="240.0" fitWidth="680.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="event-title" text="Titre de l'évènement" /> <HBox spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="event-chip" text="Type" /> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-status" text="Statut" /> </HBox> </VBox> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="buyTicketButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBuyTicketClick" styleClass="ticket-action-primary" text="Acheter ticket" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="event-description" text="Description de l'évènement" wrapText="true" />
<GridPane hgap="18.0" vgap="8.0"> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire début" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire fin" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Prix d'entrée" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Capacité" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value event-price-value" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="capacityLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Galerie:" /> <Label fx:id="galleryLabel" /> </HBox> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Métadonnées" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card ticket-section-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="ticket-section-title" text="Vos tickets" /> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="ticketsCountLabel" styleClass="ticket-count-chip" text="0 ticket(s)" /> <Button fx:id="backButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBackClick" styleClass="ticket-action-secondary" text="Retour" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="ticketsEmptyLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucun ticket achete pour cet evenement." /> <VBox fx:id="ticketsContainer" spacing="8.0" /> </VBox> </VBox> </content> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="0.0" right="0.0" top="0.0" /> </padding> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <padding> <Insets bottom="28.0" left="28.0" right="28.0" top="28.0" /> </padding> <StackPane minHeight="100.0" prefHeight="100.0" prefWidth="100.0" styleClass="success-icon-circle"> <Label styleClass="success-icon" text="✓" /> </StackPane> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Paiement réussi !" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Votre ticket pour cet évènement a été acheté avec succès." wrapText="true" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Afficher le QR Code" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Télécharger le ticket PDF" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Retour à l'évènement" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Tous les évènements" /> <Label styleClass="page-caption" text="Transaction reference : session_id" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.PaymentController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="28.0" left="28.0" right="28.0" top="28.0" /> </padding> <StackPane minHeight="100.0" prefHeight="100.0" prefWidth="100.0" styleClass="success-icon-circle"> <Label styleClass="success-icon" text="✓" /> </StackPane> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Paiement réussi !" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Votre ticket pour cet évènement a été acheté avec succès." wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="ticketReferenceLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Référence ticket" /> <Label fx:id="eventIdLabel" text="Evènement" /> <Label fx:id="userIdLabel" text="Utilisateur" /> <Label fx:id="purchaseDateLabel" text="Date d'achat" /> <Label fx:id="qrPayloadLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="QR" wrapText="true" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onShowQrCodeClick" text="Afficher le QR Code" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDownloadTicketClick" text="Télécharger le ticket PDF" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBackToEventClick" text="Retour à l'évènement" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBackToEventsClick" text="Tous les évènements" /> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
